feed.title: cpprefjp - C++日本語リファレンス

entry.title: is_constructor -- is_constructor : 出力ミスを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/meta/is_constructor.md b/reference/meta/is_constructor.md
index f19bada67..b866ac666 100644
--- a/reference/meta/is_constructor.md
+++ b/reference/meta/is_constructor.md
@@ -54,6 +54,8 @@ S::S(): is_constructor=true
 S::S(int): is_constructor=true
 S::S(const S&): is_constructor=true
 S::f(): is_constructor=false
+S::operator=(const S&): is_constructor=false
+S::~S(): is_constructor=false
 ```

entry.title: members_of -- members_of : 出力ミスを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/meta/members_of.md b/reference/meta/members_of.md
index 97f871f5d..aeb6663cb 100644
--- a/reference/meta/members_of.md
+++ b/reference/meta/members_of.md
@@ -46,6 +46,7 @@ int main() {
 
 #### 出力例
 ```
+メンバ数: 9
 ```

entry.title: display_string_of -- display_string_of : 出力ミスを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/meta/display_string_of.md b/reference/meta/display_string_of.md
index 491838372..8ca35a2f6 100644
--- a/reference/meta/display_string_of.md
+++ b/reference/meta/display_string_of.md
@@ -34,6 +34,8 @@ int main() {
 
 #### 出力例
 ```
+int
+vector
 ```

entry.title: symbol_of -- symbol_of : 出力ミスを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/meta/symbol_of.md b/reference/meta/symbol_of.md
index 74aea5728..c9db3f3a0 100644
--- a/reference/meta/symbol_of.md
+++ b/reference/meta/symbol_of.md
@@ -48,6 +48,8 @@ int main() {
 ### 出力
 ```
 演算子: ==
+演算子: =
+演算子: =
 ```

entry.title: operator_of -- operator_of : 出力ミスを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/meta/operator_of.md b/reference/meta/operator_of.md
index b37613ff9..71b08757e 100644
--- a/reference/meta/operator_of.md
+++ b/reference/meta/operator_of.md
@@ -51,6 +51,8 @@ int main() {
 ### 出力
 ```
 演算子: ==
+演算子: =
+演算子: =
 ```
